name: Chakra UI vs Ant Design
description: Comparison guide: design language lock-in (Ant) vs unopinionated style-props system (Chakra), theming extensibility, and customization strategy.

metadata.intent: Decide between Chakra UI and Ant Design for a scalable UI system

must_use: Choose based on whether you want a fixed design language or freedom
must_not: Assume you can fully remove Ant’s design language without significant effort
conventions: If you need unopinionated UI that morphs into your brand, Chakra often fits better.

steps.description: Styling: Ant follows ant.design language and limits customization to variables; Chakra emphasizes style props as the primary styling model and is not tied to a design language.
Theming: Ant exposes many variables but deep customization beyond them is discouraged; Chakra allows extending global and component defaults and composing new components via Chakra Factory.
Practical implication: Ant can be fast if you accept its visual language; Chakra is better when you need custom product branding and flexible composition.
